clusters.title: User List Page impact cluster
clusters.userVisibleChange: 用户列表页的搜索表单新增提交处理，搜索表单从静态展示变成可触发表单提交。
affectedFunctionUnits: 用户列表页搜索表单提交
uncertainties: fixture code does not show the submit handler updating query parameters or refreshing data, so list refresh is a candidate behavior to verify rather than a confirmed implementation detail

clusterAnalyses.userVisibleChange: 用户列表页的搜索表单新增提交处理，搜索表单从静态展示变成可触发表单提交。
affectedFunctionUnits: 用户列表页搜索表单提交

codeEvidenceUsed.reason: diff adds handleSubmit and wires it to Form onSubmit
UserListPage renders SearchForm and is bound to route /users

uncertainties: fixture code does not show the submit handler updating query parameters or refreshing data, so list refresh is a candidate behavior to verify rather than a confirmed implementation detail

cases.caseName: 用户列表搜索表单提交入口验证
testSteps: 点击搜索按钮或触发表单提交
expectedResults: 搜索表单可以触发提交动作
提交过程中页面不出现白屏或异常报错
若需求要求刷新列表，应验证列表按提交条件刷新
cases.impactReason: SearchForm 的 Form 新增 onSubmit 绑定，且 UserListPage 使用该组件
uncertainties: 数据刷新行为需要结合真实需求或运行行为确认

cases.caseName: 用户列表搜索按钮禁用态下的提交拦截验证
testSteps: 尝试点击搜索按钮或通过回车触发表单提交
expectedResults: 按钮禁用态展示符合预期
禁用态下不会触发无效提交
cases.impactReason: SearchForm 同时包含 disabled Button 和新增 Form submit wiring

evidence.reason: button disabled state and form submit wiring coexist in changed component
